web.description: Retrieves the earnings history for a specified time range and optionally per machine. CLI Usage: vastai show earnings [options]

cURL

Copy

Ask AI

```
curl --request GET \
  --url https://console.vast.ai/api/v0/users/{user_id}/machine-earnings/ \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'
```

#### Authorizations

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-earnings#authorization-authorization)

Authorization

string

header

required

API key must be provided in the Authorization header

#### Path Parameters

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-earnings#parameter-user-id)

user\_id

integer

required

The ID of the user.

#### Query Parameters

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-earnings#parameter-sday)

sday

integer

Start day for the earnings report.

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-earnings#parameter-eday)

eday

integer

End day for the earnings report.

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-earnings#parameter-machid)

machid

integer

Optional machine ID to filter earnings.

[​](https://docs.vast.ai/api-reference/billing/show-earnings#parameter-last-days)

last\_days

integer

Number of days to look back from today.

#### Response

200

application/json
